name: orch-os
description: Orchestration OS — monorepo for orchestrator packages and Cursor install bundle

scripts.build: npm run build -w @orch-os/core && npm run build -w @orch-os/api && npm run build -w @orch-os/ui && npm run build -w @orch-os/cli
scripts.test: npm run test -w @orch-os/core && npm run test -w @orch-os/api && npm run test -w @orch-os/ui && node tools/validate-cursor-assets.mjs
